label: Stat part (difficulty)
description: Scales the stat by a per-difficulty factor selected from a list indexed by the current difficulty setting.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factorsPerDifficulty.label: Factors per difficulty
factorsPerDifficulty.description: List of multipliers indexed by difficulty level (peaceful first, extreme last).
